title: lindsaea elatior
intro: Lindsaea elatior, also known as the "Australian tree fern," is a type of plant belonging to the family Lindsaeaceae, specifically a species of fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea elatior include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lindsaea elatior is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is typically taken orally or applied topically as a treatment for various health conditions.
